title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 338.190 - Violation of law by licensee — penalty
text:
338.190.  Violation of law by licensee — penalty. — Any person who is licensed under this chapter who violates any provision of sections 338.010 to 338.190 shall, upon conviction, be adjudged guilty of a class A misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 10022, A.L. 1951 p. 737, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 1990 H.B. 1287) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13156; 1919 § 4728; 1909 § 5780
